tool.name: scholar_scrape_citations
tool.description: Scrape papers that cite a given paper on Google Scholar. Uses the 'Cited by' link to find all citing papers. Returns up to 10 citing papers with title, authors, year, snippet, and URL.

parameters.name: citation_url
parameters.description: Google Scholar 'Cited by' URL (e.g. 'https://scholar.google.com/scholar?cites=1234567890') or direct Scholar paper cluster URL
